name: Swim Day 2: Kick Party
description: Jess: Kick-heavy day — legs, hips, glutes, core. ~30 min, 1200-1500y. Board work, back kick, breast kick. Legs will feel it. Hip openers built in via breaststroke kick.

exercises.notes: Easy free, wake up the body.
Long glides, open up the hips.
Steady flutter kick. Compact, from the hips. No death grip on the board.
Kick — squeeze — gliiiiide. Count to 3 on each glide. Hip opener city.
No board, arms at sides. Relax the neck, look at the ceiling, kick easy.
Surface dolphin kick on your back. Gentle wave motion. Skip if back feels off.
Build effort: 50 easy / 50 moderate / 50 moderate / 50 easy. Like a wave.

tips: Breaststroke kick is amazing for pregnancy hip mobility — lean into it
If flutter kick aggravates the lower back, switch to back kick or breast kick
Keep the dolphin kick gentle — surface only, soft undulation
Bring a water bottle — kicking is sneaky cardio
